login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your details below to create your account
register.name: Name

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Please enter your new password below

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.description: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
verifyEmail.heading: Email verification
verifyEmail.newLinkSent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile and account settings

profile.title: Profile settings
profile.heading: Profile Settings
profile.infoDescription: Update your name and email address
profile.name: Name
profile.resendVerification: Click here to resend the verification email.
profile.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

password.title: Password settings
password.heading: Password Settings
password.updateDescription: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.heading: Two-Factor Authentication Settings
twoFactor.enabledDescription: With two-factor authentication enabled, you will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
twoFactor.disabledDescription: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteAccount.warningDescription: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

twoFactorAuth.enabledDescription: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
twoFactorAuth.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactorAuth.enableDescription: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app
twoFactorAuth.recoveryCodesDescription: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
twoFactorAuth.codesInfo: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click Regenerate Codes above.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.networkError: Network error, please try again later
errors.failedFetchSetupKey: Failed to fetch a setup key

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: Laravel has an incredibly rich ecosystem.
welcome.suggestion: We suggest starting with the following.

userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.manageUsers: Manage system users and their permissions
userManagement.name: Name
userManagement.noUsersFound: No users found matching your criteria
userManagement.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current password
userManagement.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
userManagement.addNewUser: Add a new user to the system
userManagement.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
